_methodology: Monthly cost estimates in USD for a single digital nomad. Values are calibrated using World Bank GDP per capita (nominal and PPP), Price Level Ratios, and cross-referenced against Numbeo Cost of Living Index, NomadList city cost data, Expatistan, and Airbnb/Coworker.com listings. Countries are grouped by GDP/PPP tier and adjusted for regional purchasing patterns. null indicates data unavailable or concept inapplicable (e.g., coworking in conflict zones).

categories.name: Rent (City Center)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city center of the country's main hub city for digital nomads.

categories.name: Rent (Outside Center)
categories.description: Monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment outside the city center, in a residential area with reasonable commute access.

categories.name: Groceries
categories.description: Monthly grocery spending for one person cooking at home ~70% of meals. Includes fresh produce, staples, and basics.

categories.name: Dining Out
categories.description: Approximately 12 meals per month at inexpensive to mid-range restaurants. Covers lunch or dinner at a local cafe/restaurant.

categories.name: Public Transport
categories.description: Monthly public transportation pass or estimated ride-hailing costs for daily commute within the city.

categories.name: Utilities & Internet
categories.description: Monthly utilities for a 1-bedroom apartment: electricity, water, heating/cooling, garbage collection, plus a reliable internet connection (50+ Mbps where available).

categories.name: Coworking Space
categories.description: Monthly hot desk membership at a coworking space with reliable wifi, power, and basic amenities. null if no coworking spaces are available in the country.

categories.name: Health Insurance
categories.description: Monthly cost of basic private health or travel insurance suitable for a digital nomad. Covers emergency care and outpatient visits.

derivedTotals.name: Basic Monthly Budget
derivedTotals.description: Minimum monthly budget for basic living: apartment outside center, home cooking, public transit, and utilities. No dining out, coworking, or insurance.

derivedTotals.name: Comfortable Monthly Budget
derivedTotals.formula: rentCenter + groceries + dining + transport + utilities + coworking + healthInsurance
derivedTotals.description: Comfortable nomad lifestyle: city center apartment, groceries + dining out, transport, utilities, coworking membership, and health insurance. null if coworking is unavailable.
